strategy: Attack with Storm or Life (his listed boost schools); he resists Fire, Ice, and Death.
Do NOT clear his minions or beguile him — killing minions and beguiling both stack extra Frozen Armor absorbs on him, making him far tankier.
He opens with only one 800-damage absorb, so focus Eirikur directly through that single shield while leaving the Thundersnow Trolls alive.
Stack blades, traps, and a Feint, then hit for well over 800 to punch through the opening absorb and into his health.
Watch his natural attack, which applies a universal pierce to his side; keep your own resist in mind.
cheatNotes: He opens with a Frozen Armor absorbing 800 damage — your first hit needs ~800 of overkill just to start denting his health.
Kill two of his minions and he gains a second absorb (1,600). Leave minions up if you can and focus him directly.
Killing his last minion hands him a third absorb (3,200). Clearing the minions makes him tankier, not easier.
Beguiling him also triggers those last two absorbs (4,800 total) — don't beguile this boss; just burst him through the single opening absorb.
